name: Olive Garden Pasta Fajoli Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring Clamato juice, tomatoes, consomme, and the rest of the ingredients from the first column to a boil.
2. Simmer for half an hour.
3. Saute ground beef until browned thoroughly and set aside.
4. Saute vegetables (onion, celery, carrots, and cabbage) until soft. Add to soup and simmer for another half an hour.
5. Add kidney beans, navy beans, cooked pasta, and meat. Continue to simmer for another 20 minutes.
This makes a great meal accompanied by bread or buns of your choice and a green salad.
